Me

About
Me,

I am a Computer Science student and developer passionate about building efficient web systems and solving real-world problems.

My focus is full-stack development, especially with Next.js, JavaScript, React, and scalable backend systems.

I work with a strategic, adaptable mindset and stay focused on clean, scalable architecture that holds up as products grow.

different.

Things I've
shipped.

01
Gaming · Scalability
Kazhudha Multiplayer
Real-time multiplayer card game with WebSocket architecture. Event-driven system with state synchronization and fault tolerance built for scale.
Node.jsSocket.ioRedisReact
View project
02
Career · Technology
Resume Analyzer
NLP-powered resume parsing and job matching recommendation engine. Named Entity Recognition + Semantic similarity scoring for precision matching.
PythonspaCyBERTFastAPI
View project
03
EdTech · Innovation
AI Mock Interview Platform
LLM-powered interview simulator with real-time feedback and scoring. Prompt engineering + RAG system for contextual, adaptive questioning.
OpenAI APINext.jsTypeScriptSupabase
View project
04
SaaS · Cloud
Rotate.io
Cloud-based platform to manage and automate device sharing and rotation among multiple users. Ensures fair access, avoids conflicts, and supports remote usage.
React.jsNode.jsAWSMongoDBREST API
View project
05
EdTech · Attendance
IP Attendance Management
A web-based attendance system where students submit their ID/name during a live session started by the admin. Attendance is marked (Present/Absent) using Wi-Fi/IP validation. It includes selfie capture (camera → base64), device tracking via localStorage, session time limits, JSON data storage, Excel export using ExcelJS, and secure admin access with an ADMIN_TOKEN.
Node.jsExpressHTML/CSSVanilla JSExcelJSJSON
View project
